title: I Was a Guest on The Pen Addict
summary: Brad asked me to fill in for Myke this week
content:
Myke was off this week so Brad asked me to fill in on episode 689 of The Pen Addict.

We caught up on what I've been up to since the last time I was on in March, how pens led me indirectly into drawing for St Jude and then Inktober. To wrap up toptober we did our top five stationery items of this year which included a discussion of our handwriting styles.

Listen to The Pen Addict 689: A Platypus Riding A Bicycle

Since recording I have ordered Diamine Claret, Brad is sending me a sample of Pilot Iroshizuku Tsutsuji and Ben is sending me a sample of Robert Oster Hot Pink to try out in my Funky Town.
